idea.raw_input: Add a feature in the budget tracker app where users can see the values of how much they have per account. Can be seen on the home page and a separate page for accounts. Follow the design template of the other pages.

overview.problem: Users cannot see how much money they have per account/card because transactions are tracked but balances are only shown as a single net worth number.
overview.solution: Show a per-account balance breakdown as a compact summary card on the Home dashboard and a dedicated Accounts page listing each account with its computed balance.
overview.target_user: Fortuna budget app users who track multiple bank accounts/cards.
overview.success_metric: Users can view balance per account on home page and navigate to a dedicated accounts screen showing all accounts with computed balances.

screens.name: Dashboard (Home) — Account Balances Card
screens.purpose: Compact card on home page showing per-account balance breakdown with tap-to-view-all.

screens.name: AccountsPage
screens.purpose: Dedicated page showing all accounts with individual computed balances, matching existing page design patterns.

features.name: Compute balance per account from transactions
features.description: BudgetModel computes balance for each account by summing all transactions assigned to that account (income positive, expenses negative). Returns a list of account-balance pairs.
acceptance_criteria: Given transactions exist with different accountIds, when getBalancePerAccount is called, then each account's balance is the sum of its transactions.
Given no transactions for an account, when balance is computed, then that account shows 0.00.
The default 'Cash' account is always included even with no transactions.

features.name: Account balances summary card on Dashboard
features.description: A compact card added to the home dashboard showing each account name and its computed balance, with a 'View all' link to the Accounts page.
acceptance_criteria: Given accounts exist with transactions, when dashboard loads, then the card shows each account name and formatted balance.
Given the card is displayed, when user taps 'View all', then the app navigates to the Accounts page.
The card follows the existing Fortuna card design (surfaceContainerLowest, rounded corners, shadow).

features.name: Dedicated Accounts page
features.description: A new screen accessible from the dashboard card showing all accounts with their balances, using the same page layout pattern as other screens (header, scrollable list).
acceptance_criteria: Given the Accounts page is opened, then all accounts from AccountSettingsModel are displayed.
Each account row shows the account icon, name, and computed balance.
The page header follows the same style as TransactionHistory and other pages.
An empty state is shown if only the default Cash account exists with zero balance.

data.backend_notes: Balances computed from BudgetModel.transactions (already persisted to SharedPreferences). Account list from AccountSettingsModel.

out_of_scope: Editing accounts from the Accounts page (use Settings)
Account-level transaction filtering on the Accounts page
Charts or graphs on the Accounts page

tickets.title: Add getBalancePerAccount method to BudgetModel
tickets.description: Add getBalancePerAccount() method that computes per-account balances from transactions. Returns Map<String, double> mapping accountId to sum of amounts.
inputs: FEA-001: Compute balance per account from transactions
Uses existing _transactions list, AccountSettingsModel for account names/icons
acceptance_criteria: Given transactions exist with different accountIds, when getBalancePerAccount is called, then each account's balance equals the sum of its transaction amounts.
Given no transactions exist, when getBalancePerAccount is called, then an empty map is returned.
The method returns Map<String, double> where keys are account IDs.
tickets.coder_notes: Iterate _transactions and fold amounts by accountId. No async needed — uses in-memory _transactions list.

tickets.title: Create account_balance_card widget for Accounts page
tickets.description: Reusable card widget showing an account's icon, name, and formatted balance. Used in the Accounts page list.
inputs: Follow Fortuna card design: surfaceContainerLowest, rounded corners, shadow
acceptance_criteria: Given an Account and balance, when rendered, then the card shows the account icon, name, and formatted balance.
Card follows existing Fortuna card design patterns (container with border, shadow, padding).
Balance is formatted with commas and 2 decimal places.
tickets.coder_notes: StatelessWidget taking Account and double balance as parameters. Use the same Container decoration pattern as NetWorthCard.

tickets.title: Create AccountsScreen
tickets.description: Dedicated Accounts page showing all accounts with their computed balances. Follows Fortuna page layout pattern with header, scrollable list, and empty state.
inputs: Uses AccountSettingsModel for account list, BudgetModel.getBalancePerAccount for balances
acceptance_criteria: Given accounts exist, when the screen loads, then all accounts from AccountSettingsModel are displayed.
Each account row shows icon, name, and computed balance from BudgetModel.getBalancePerAccount().
The page header follows the same style as TransactionHistoryScreen header.
Only custom accounts (not Cash) can be deleted via a delete icon.
An empty message is shown if only Cash account exists with zero balance.
tickets.coder_notes: Consumer2<AccountSettingsModel, BudgetModel> to get accounts + balances. Page structure follows the pattern from settings_page.dart: SafeArea > SingleChildScrollView > Column with header.

tickets.title: Create AccountBalancesCard widget for Dashboard
tickets.description: Compact card widget for the Dashboard showing per-account balance summary with a 'View all' link to the Accounts page.
inputs: FEA-002: Account balances summary card on Dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Given accounts with balances exist, when rendered, then the card shows each account name and formatted balance.
A 'View all' text button is shown at the bottom of the card.
Given 'View all' is tapped, then the app navigates to the Accounts page.
The card follows existing Fortuna card design patterns.
tickets.coder_notes: StatelessWidget using Consumer2<AccountSettingsModel, BudgetModel>. Navigation to /accounts route. Same Container decoration as other dashboard cards.

tickets.title: Update DashboardScreen to include AccountBalancesCard
tickets.description: Add AccountBalancesCard to the dashboard layout in both mobile and desktop configurations, adjusting animation controllers count.
acceptance_criteria: Given the dashboard is loaded, when AccountBalancesCard is added, then it appears in the layout with proper animation.
The mobile layout shows AccountBalancesCard after the existing cards.
The desktop layout includes AccountBalancesCard in the grid.
The number of animation controllers is updated to match the new card count.
No analyzer errors after the change.
tickets.coder_notes: Add AccountBalancesCard to both _buildMobileLayout and _buildDesktopLayout. Update _controllers list from 6 to 7 and add corresponding animations.

tickets.title: Add /accounts route to app router and tabs
tickets.description: Add the /accounts route to the GoRouter ShellRoute and add an Accounts tab to the bottom navigation bar.
acceptance_criteria: Given the app is running, when /accounts is navigated to, then AccountsScreen is displayed.
An Accounts tab appears in the bottom navigation bar with appropriate icon.
The tab follows the same styling as other bottom nav tabs.
tickets.coder_notes: Add GoRoute for /accounts in ShellRoute routes list. Add _TabInfo for Accounts in _tabs list with Icons.account_balance_wallet icon.

Given no transactions for an account, when balance is called, then that account shows 0.00.

prd_checks.reason: Only shows account balances per FEA-003

A 'View all' text button is shown at the bottom of the card.

The desktop layout includes AccountBalancesCard in the grid.
